C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. CASE SETTLED PRIOR TO SWEARING OF WITNESSES. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE AT 679-681 SUTTER STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. AND FOR MONEY DAMAGES OF $9,100.00. STAY EXECUTION FOR TWENTY DAYS UNTIL 1/20/93.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSALES, RAYMOND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 679-681 SUTTER ST, SF 94102 $9,100.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,100.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-20-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT ENTERED AS TO RAYMOND M.
